title: incorect query result when handling timestamp
description:
## Bug Report

Please answer these questions before submitting your issue. Thanks!

### 1. Minimal reproduce step (Required)

<!-- a step by step guide for reproducing the bug. -->

``` SQL
CREATE TABLE `tdccbfad6` (
  `col_5` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=gbk COLLATE=gbk_bin;

INSERT INTO `tdccbfad6` VALUES('1980-09-23 00:00:00'),('2021-12-24 00:00:00'),('2020-06-30 00:00:00'),('1975-01-24 00:00:00'),('2016-11-29 00:00:00'),('2004-08-09 00:00:00');

SELECT `tdccbfad6`.`col_5` AS `r0` FROM `tdccbfad6` JOIN (SELECT CONCAT_WS(',', `tdccbfad6`.`col_5`, `tdccbfad6`.`col_5`) AS `r0` FROM `tdccbfad6` WHERE `tdccbfad6`.`col_5` IN ('2016-11-29','2021-12-24','1980-09-23','1975-01-24')) AS `st_38` ON `tdccbfad6`.`col_5`=`st_38`.`r0` WHERE `tdccbfad6`.`col_5`='2021-12-24';

```

### 2. What did you expect to see? (Required)

MySQL:
``` SQL
mysql> SELECT `tdccbfad6`.`col_5` AS `r0` FROM `tdccbfad6` JOIN (SELECT CONCAT_WS(',', `tdccbfad6`.`col_5`, `tdccbfad6`.`col_5`) AS `r0` FROM `tdccbfad6` WHERE `tdccbfad6`.`col_5` IN ('2016-11-29','2021-12-24','1980-09-23','1975-01-24')) AS `st_38` ON `tdccbfad6`.`col_5`=`st_38`.`r0` WHERE `tdccbfad6`.`col_5`='2021-12-24';
+---------------------+
| r0                  |
+---------------------+
| 2021-12-24 00:00:00 |
+---------------------+
1 row in set, 6 warnings (0.01 sec)
```
### 3. What did you see instead (Required)
``` sql
mysql> SELECT `tdccbfad6`.`col_5` AS `r0` FROM `tdccbfad6` JOIN (SELECT CONCAT_WS(',', `tdccbfad6`.`col_5`, `tdccbfad6`.`col_5`) AS `r0` FROM `tdccbfad6` WHERE `tdccbfad6`.`col_5` IN ('2016-11-29','2021-12-24','1980-09-23','1975-01-24')) AS `st_38` ON `tdccbfad6`.`col_5`=`st_38`.`r0` WHERE `tdccbfad6`.`col_5`='2021-12-24';
Empty set, 4 warnings (0.01 sec)
```
### 4. What is your TiDB version? (Required)
724f8e1ab8ca79ae571416079375d6569ece23d5
<!-- Paste the output of SELECT tidb_version() -->
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_timestamps (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, event_time TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, description VARCHAR(255));

INSERT INTO test_timestamps VALUES (1, TIMESTAMP('1980-09-23 00:00:00'), 'Event A'), (2, TIMESTAMP('2021-12-24 00:00:00'), 'Event B'), (3, TIMESTAMP('2020-06-30 00:00:00'), 'Event C'), (4, TIMESTAMP('1975-01-24 00:00:00'), 'Event D'), (5, TIMESTAMP('2016-11-29 00:00:00'), 'Event E');
SELECT id, event_time FROM test_timestamps WHERE event_time IN (TIMESTAMP('2016-11-29 00:00:00'), TIMESTAMP('2021-12-24 00:00:00'));
SELECT id, event_time FROM test_timestamps WHERE event_time BETWEEN TIMESTAMP('1970-01-01 00:00:00') AND TIMESTAMP('2025-01-01 00:00:00');
SELECT id, event_time FROM test_timestamps WHERE event_time IS NULL;
key_bug_features: Incorrect query result when handling timestamp values
